entries.name: ChatGPT for Trip Planning
entries.description: General-purpose LLM used by millions for travel research, itinerary building, and booking advice.
entries.travelUseCase: Itinerary generation, destination research, price comparison advice

entries.name: Google Gemini Travel Features
entries.description: Gemini integration in Google Search and Maps providing AI-generated travel overviews and direct booking links.
entries.travelUseCase: AI search overviews for flights/hotels, Google Maps AI recommendations, trip planning in Gemini

entries.name: Perplexity AI Travel Search
entries.description: AI-powered search engine that provides cited travel recommendations and real-time pricing information.
entries.travelUseCase: Travel research with source citations, real-time flight and hotel pricing queries

entries.name: Autonomous AI Booking Agents
entries.description: AI agents that can autonomously search, compare, and book travel end-to-end without human intervention.
entries.travelUseCase: End-to-end autonomous booking, multi-step travel planning, price monitoring and auto-rebooking

entries.name: Microsoft Copilot Travel
entries.description: Copilot integration for corporate travel management within Microsoft 365 ecosystem.
entries.travelUseCase: Corporate trip planning via Teams/Outlook, expense auto-categorization, policy compliance checking

entries.name: KAYAK Ask
entries.description: AI-powered conversational search experience built directly into KAYAK for natural language travel queries.
entries.travelUseCase: Natural language flight/hotel search, flexible date suggestions, price alerts via chat

entries.name: Hopper Price Prediction AI
entries.description: AI that predicts future flight and hotel prices with high accuracy, advising users when to buy or wait.
entries.travelUseCase: Price prediction, buy/wait recommendations, price freeze features, fare monitoring
